zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Stephens於1459年出生在英國薩默塞特韋斯特 納德時，他的父親John Stephen34歲，母親Alice Shaw34歲。他於1484年與Anna Cross在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韋斯特 納德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1552年享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福洛斯特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Stephens was born in 1459, in West Pennard, Somerset, England, his father, John Stephen, was 34 and his mother, Alice Shaw, was 34. He married Anna Cross in 1484, in West Pennard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1552, at the age of 93, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Frocester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Stephens est né en 1459, à West Pennard, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Stephen, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Shaw, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Anna Cross en 1484, à West Pennard, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1552, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à St Peter's Church, Frocester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Stephens è nato il nel 1459 nel West Pennard, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Stephen, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Shaw, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Anna Cross nel 1484, nel West Pennard, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Stephensが1459年にイギリスソメルセトウエスト ペナルドで生まれた時，父John Stephenは34歳，母Alice Shawは34歳であった。1484年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエスト ペナルドでAnna Crossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1552年に93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフロセスタースト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St.peters, Frocester, Gloucs, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프록스터 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Stephens(이)가 1459년 영국 서머세트 웨스트 펜아르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stephen(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Shaw(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웨스트 펜아르드에서 Anna Cross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1552년 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프록스터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.St.peters, Frocester, Gloucs, England: ст питир'с чурч, фросестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Stephens родился в 1459 г. в местности вест пеннард, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Stephen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Shaw, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Cross в 1484 г. в местности вест пеннард, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1552 г. в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир'с чурч, фросестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
